children.heading: Regional service area; establishment of MA regions
children.label: a Regional service area; establishment of MA regions

children.heading: Coverage of entire MA region
children.label: 1 Coverage of entire MA region
children.text: The service area for an MA regional plan shall consist of an entire MA region established under paragraph (2) and the provisions of shall not apply to such a plan.section 1395w–24(h) of this title

children.heading: MA region
children.label: A MA region
children.text: For purposes of this subchapter, the term “MA region” means such a region within the 50 States and the District of Columbia as established by the Secretary under this paragraph.

children.heading: Initial establishment
children.label: i Initial establishment
children.text: Not later than , the Secretary shall first establish and publish MA regions.January 1, 2005

children.heading: Periodic review and revision of service areas
children.label: ii Periodic review and revision of service areas
children.text: The Secretary may periodically review MA regions under this paragraph and, based on such review, may revise such regions if the Secretary determines such revision to be appropriate.

children.heading: Number of regions
children.label: i Number of regions
children.text: There shall be no fewer than 10 regions, and no more than 50 regions.

children.heading: Maximizing availability of plans
children.label: ii Maximizing availability of plans
children.text: The regions shall maximize the availability of MA regional plans to all MA eligible individuals without regard to health status, especially those residing in rural areas.

children.heading: Market survey and analysis
children.label: D Market survey and analysis
children.text: Before establishing MA regions, the Secretary shall conduct a market survey and analysis, including an examination of current insurance markets, to determine how the regions should be established.

children.heading: National plan
children.label: 3 National plan
children.text: Nothing in this subsection shall be construed as preventing an MA regional plan from being offered in more than one MA region (including all regions).

children.heading: Application of single deductible and catastrophic limit on out-of-pocket expenses
children.label: b Application of single deductible and catastrophic limit on out-of-pocket expenses

children.heading: Single deductible
children.label: 1 Single deductible
children.text: Any deductible for benefits under the original medicare fee-for-service program option shall be a single deductible (instead of a separate inpatient hospital deductible and a part B deductible) and may be applied differentially for in-network services and may be waived for preventive or other items and services.

children.heading: In-network
children.label: A In-network
children.text: A catastrophic limit on out-of-pocket expenditures for in-network benefits under the original medicare fee-for-service program option.

children.heading: Total
children.label: B Total
children.text: A catastrophic limit on out-of-pocket expenditures for all benefits under the original medicare fee-for-service program option.

children.heading: Portion of total payments to an organization subject to risk for 2006 and 2007
children.label: c Portion of total payments to an organization subject to risk for 2006 and 2007

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: This subsection shall only apply to MA regional plans offered during 2006 or 2007.

children.heading: Notification of allowable costs under the plan
children.label: B Notification of allowable costs under the plan
i
children.text: its total amount of costs that the organization incurred in providing benefits covered under the original medicare fee-for-service program option for all enrollees under the plan in the region in the year and the portion of such costs that is attributable to administrative expenses described in subparagraph (C); and

children.label: ii
children.text: its total amount of costs that the organization incurred in providing rebatable integrated benefits (as defined in subparagraph (D)) and with respect to such benefits the portion of such costs that is attributable to administrative expenses described in subparagraph (C) and not described in clause (i) of this subparagraph.

children.heading: Allowable costs defined
children.label: C Allowable costs defined
children.text: For purposes of this subsection, the term “allowable costs” means, with respect to an MA regional plan for a year, the total amount of costs described in subparagraph (B) for the plan and year, reduced by the portion of such costs attributable to administrative expenses incurred in providing the benefits described in such subparagraph.

children.heading: Rebatable integrated benefits
children.label: D Rebatable integrated benefits
children.text: For purposes of this subsection, the term “rebatable integrated benefits” means such non-drug supplemental benefits under subclause (I) of pursuant to a rebate under such section that the Secretary determines are integrated with the benefits described in subparagraph (B)(i).section 1395w–24(b)(1)(C)(ii) of this title

children.heading: No adjustment if allowable costs within 3 percent of target amount
children.label: A No adjustment if allowable costs within 3 percent of target amount
children.text: If the allowable costs for the plan for the year are at least 97 percent, but do not exceed 103 percent, of the target amount for the plan and year, there shall be no payment adjustment under this subsection for the plan and year.

children.heading: Increase in payment if allowable costs above 103 percent of target amount
children.label: B Increase in payment if allowable costs above 103 percent of target amount

children.heading: Costs between 103 and 108 percent of target amount
children.label: i Costs between 103 and 108 percent of target amount
children.text: If the allowable costs for the plan for the year are greater than 103 percent, but not greater than 108 percent, of the target amount for the plan and year, the Secretary shall increase the total of the monthly payments made to the organization offering the plan for the year under by an amount equal to 50 percent of the difference between such allowable costs and 103 percent of such target amount.section 1395w–23(a) of this title

children.heading: Costs above 108 percent of target amount
children.label: ii Costs above 108 percent of target amount
I
children.text: 2.5 percent of such target amount; and

children.label: II
children.text: 80 percent of the difference between such allowable costs and 108 percent of such target amount.

children.heading: Reduction in payment if allowable costs below 97 percent of target amount
children.label: C Reduction in payment if allowable costs below 97 percent of target amount

children.heading: Costs between 92 and 97 percent of target amount
children.label: i Costs between 92 and 97 percent of target amount
children.text: If the allowable costs for the plan for the year are less than 97 percent, but greater than or equal to 92 percent, of the target amount for the plan and year, the Secretary shall reduce the total of the monthly payments made to the organization offering the plan for the year under by an amount (or otherwise recover from the plan an amount) equal to 50 percent of the difference between 97 percent of the target amount and such allowable costs.section 1395w–23(a) of this title

children.heading: Costs below 92 percent of target amount
children.label: ii Costs below 92 percent of target amount
I
children.text: 2.5 percent of such target amount; and

children.label: II
children.text: 80 percent of the difference between 92 percent of such target amount and such allowable costs.

children.label: I
children.text: the total monthly payments made to the organization for enrollees in the plan for the year that are attributable to benefits under the original medicare fee-for-service program option (as defined in );section 1395w–22(a)(1)(B) of this title

children.label: II
children.text: the total of the MA monthly basic beneficiary premium collectable for such enrollees for the year; and

children.label: III
children.text: the total amount of the rebates under that are attributable to rebatable integrated benefits; reduced bysection 1395w–24(b)(1)(C)(ii) of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: the amount of administrative expenses assumed in the bid insofar as the bid is attributable to benefits described in clause (i)(I) or (i)(III).

children.label: i
children.text: that an MA organization offering an MA regional plan shall provide the Secretary with such information as the Secretary determines is necessary to carry out this subsection; and

children.label: ii
children.text: that, pursuant to , the Secretary has the right to inspect and audit any books and records of the organization that pertain to the information regarding costs provided to the Secretary under paragraph (1)(B).section 1395w–27(d)(2)(B) of this title

children.heading: Restriction on use of information
children.label: B Restriction on use of information
children.text: Information disclosed or obtained pursuant to the provisions of this subsection may be used by officers, employees, and contractors of the Department of Health and Human Services only for the purposes of, and to the extent necessary in, carrying out this subsection.

children.label: A
children.text: meets the requirements of with respect to at least one such State in such region; andsection 1395w–25(a)(1) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: with respect to each other State in such region in which it does not meet requirements, it demonstrates to the satisfaction of the Secretary that it has filed the necessary application to meet such requirements,

children.heading: Selection of appropriate State
children.label: 2 Selection of appropriate State
children.text: In applying paragraph (1) in the case of an MA organization that meets the requirements of with respect to more than one State in a region, the organization shall select, in a manner specified by the Secretary among such States, one State the rules of which shall apply in the case of the States described in paragraph (1)(B).section 1395w–25(a)(1) of this title

children.heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 111–148, title X, § 10327(c)(1)124 Stat. 964Mar. 23, 2010
children.label: e Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 111–148, title X, § 10327(c)(1)124 Stat. 964Mar. 23, 2010

children.heading: Computation of applicable MA region-specific non-drug monthly benchmark amounts
children.label: f Computation of applicable MA region-specific non-drug monthly benchmark amounts

children.heading: Computation for regions
children.label: 1 Computation for regions
children.text: For purposes of and this section, subject to subsection (e), the term “MA region-specific non-drug monthly benchmark amount” means, with respect to an MA region for a month in a year, the sum of the 2 components described in paragraph (2) for the region and year. The Secretary shall compute such benchmark amount for each MA region before the beginning of each annual, coordinated election period under for each year (beginning with 2006).section 1395w–23(j)(2) of this titlesection 1395w–21(e)(3)(B) of this title

children.heading: Statutory region-specific non-drug amount
children.label: i Statutory region-specific non-drug amount
children.text: The statutory region-specific non-drug amount (as defined in paragraph (3)) for the region and year.

children.heading: Statutory national market share
children.label: ii Statutory national market share
children.text: The statutory national market share percentage, determined under paragraph (4) for the year.

children.heading: Weighted average of MA plan bids in region
children.label: i Weighted average of MA plan bids in region
children.text: The weighted average of the plan bids for the region and year (as determined under paragraph (5)(A)).

children.heading: Non-statutory market share
children.label: ii Non-statutory market share
children.text: 1 minus the statutory national market share percentage, determined under paragraph (4) for the year.

children.label: A
children.text: MA area-specific non-drug monthly benchmark amount under for that area and year; andsection 1395w–23(j)(1)(A) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the number of MA eligible individuals residing in the local area, divided by the total number of MA eligible individuals residing in the region.

children.heading: Computation of statutory market share percentage
children.label: 4 Computation of statutory market share percentage

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Secretary shall determine for each year a statutory national market share percentage that is equal to the proportion of MA eligible individuals nationally who were not enrolled in an MA plan during the reference month.

children.heading: Reference month defined
children.label: B Reference month defined
children.text: For purposes of this part, the term “reference month” means, with respect to a year, the most recent month during the previous year for which the Secretary determines that data are available to compute the percentage specified in subparagraph (A) and other relevant percentages under this part.

children.heading: Determination of weighted average MA bids for a region
children.label: 5 Determination of weighted average MA bids for a region

children.heading: Monthly MA statutory non-drug bid amount
children.label: i Monthly MA statutory non-drug bid amount
children.text: The unadjusted MA statutory non-drug monthly bid amount for the plan.

children.heading: Plan’s share of MA enrollment in region
children.label: ii Plan’s share of MA enrollment in region
children.text: The factor described in subparagraph (B) for the plan.

children.heading: Plan’s share of MA enrollment in region
children.label: B Plan’s share of MA enrollment in region

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: Subject to the succeeding provisions of this subparagraph, the factor described in this subparagraph for a plan is equal to the number of individuals described in subparagraph (C) for such plan, divided by the total number of such individuals for all MA regional plans described in subparagraph (D) for that region and year.

children.heading: Single plan rule
children.label: ii Single plan rule
children.text: In the case of an MA region in which only a single MA regional plan is being offered, the factor described in this subparagraph shall be equal to 1.

children.heading: Equal division among multiple plans in year in which plans are first available
children.label: iii Equal division among multiple plans in year in which plans are first available
I
children.text: 1 divided by the number of such plans offered in such year; or

children.label: II
children.text: a factor for such plan that is based upon the organization’s estimate of projected enrollment, as reviewed and adjusted by the Secretary to ensure reasonableness and as is certified by the Chief Actuary of the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services.

children.heading: Counting of individuals
children.label: C Counting of individuals
children.text: For purposes of subparagraph (B)(i), the Secretary shall count for each MA regional plan described in subparagraph (D) for an MA region and year, the number of individuals who reside in the region and who were enrolled under such plan under this part during the reference month.

children.heading: Plans covered
children.label: D Plans covered
children.text: For an MA region and year, an MA regional plan described in this subparagraph is an MA regional plan that is offered in the region and year and was offered in the region in the reference month.

children.heading: Election of uniform coverage determination
children.label: g Election of uniform coverage determination
children.text: Instead of applying with respect to an MA regional plan, the organization offering the plan may elect to have a local coverage determination for the entire MA region be the local coverage determination applied for any part of such region (as selected by the organization).section 1395w–22(a)(2)(C) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the organization provides assurances satisfactory to the Secretary that the organization will make payment to the hospital for inpatient hospital services of an amount that is not less than the amount that would be payable to the hospital under with respect to such services; andsection 1395ww of this title

children.label: B
children.text: with respect to specific inpatient hospital services provided to an enrollee, the hospital demonstrates to the satisfaction of the Secretary that the hospital’s costs of such services exceed the payment amount described in subparagraph (A).

children.label: A
children.text: the amount of payment that would have been paid for such services under this subchapter if the enrollees were covered under the original medicare fee-for-service program option and the hospital were a critical access hospital; exceeds

children.label: B
children.text: the amount of payment made for such services under paragraph (1)(A).

children.label: B
children.text: in each succeeding year the amount specified in this paragraph for the preceding year increased by the market basket percentage increase (as defined in ) for the fiscal year ending in such succeeding year.section 1395ww(b)(3)(B)(iii) of this title

children.heading: Essential hospital
children.label: 4 Essential hospital
children.text: In this subsection, the term “essential hospital” means, with respect to an MA regional plan offered by an MA organization, a subsection (d) hospital (as defined in ) that the Secretary determines, based upon an application filed by the organization with the Secretary, is necessary to meet the requirements referred to in paragraph (1) for such plan.section 1395ww(d) of this title
